title: Lobotomy Corporation - Sanguine Desire
description: The girl begged in tears. Mister, please cut off my feet...
body:
# Sanguine Desire
"The girl begged in tears. Mister, please cut off my feet..."

Change the Netherite Axe into Bloody Desire from [Lobotomy Corporation](https://store.steampowered.com/app/568220/Lobotomy_Corporation__Monster_Management_Simulation/)

check other project moon resourcepacks:

[Lobotomy Solemn Lament - bow and crossbow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/solemn-lament)

[Lobotomy Solemn Lament - sheild](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/solemn-lament-shield)

[Limbus Ring Brush](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ring-brush-netherite-sword)

[Limbus E.G.O. Gifts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/limbus-e.g.o.-gifts-pack)

[Lobotomy Sanguine Desire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lobotomy-corporation-sanguine-desire)

[Lobotomy - Mimicry](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lobotomy-corporation-mimicry)

[Lobotomy - DaCapo](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lobotomy-corporation-dacapo)
